examples: He shielded his eyes against the dazzling declining sun.
He gave Alberg a dazzling smile.
Victoria stood out as a dazzling nonconformist.
The views over picturesque Clew Bay, which is dotted with 365 islands, are dazzling, especially at sunset.
Two weeks after her dazzling Oaks win, Jackson ran her in the Preakness Stakes against males.
